name: pdfforge
description: PDFForge — a hub of self-contained PDF tools (iLovePDF-style).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @pdfforge/api" "npm run dev -w @pdfforge/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pdfforge/config && npm run build -w @pdfforge/pdf-core && npm run build -w @pdfforge/api && npm run build -w @pdfforge/web
